channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Comment installer et configurer un VPN sur Mac ?
item.description: Un VPN est aujourd'hui essentiel pour se protéger des menaces qui pullulent en ligne : surveillance, vol de données, piratage... Mais savez-vous comment configurer proprement un VPN sur Mac ? Si ce n'est pas le cas, voici notre tutoriel.

item.title: 'That branch of AI is lethal. We've got to do something about that' — Neil deGrasse Tyson wants to ban AI superintelligence
item.description: Neil deGrasse Tyson’s call to ban AI superintelligence underscores rising fears that future AI could outpace human control and force global action

item.title: « Nous sommes le seul opérateur en France à faire croître ses revenus » : Free réussit à garder la tête hors de l’eau dans un marché stagnant
item.description: Ce matin, Free a invité la presse afin de présenter ses résultats financiers sur l'année 2025. Malgré des vents contraires et un marché amorphe, le trublion des télécoms continue d'afficher des résultats positifs. Le groupe Iliad s'affiche ainsi comme leader de la croissance en France et en Europe.

item.title: PS5 console architect Mark Cerny confirms FSR Frame Generation is coming to PlayStation 'at some point' but not in 2026 — 'All I can say is that we have no more releases planned for this year'
item.description: Sony has confirmed that PlayStation will soon receive AMD's FSR (FidelityFX Super Resolution) Frame Generation technology.

item.title: Ayaneo says selling its Windows gaming handheld ‘is no longer sustainable’
item.description: Ayaneo is suspending preorders for its $1,999 Next 2 gaming handheld due to the skyrocketing price of digital storage. In a post on Monday, Ayaneo says the overall cost to build its Windows handheld now nearly doubles the price it originally set, making it "unsustainable" to continue selling. "Even before the launch of NEXT 2, […]

item.title: Les astronomes assistent à une scène incroyable : la naissance d’un système solaire qui pourrait ressembler au nôtre !
item.description: L’observation du disque de gaz et de poussière entourant Wispit 2 pourrait offrir des indices clés pour comprendre les origines de notre propre Système solaire. La découverte d’une deuxième planète et la probable existence d'une troisième donnent aux astronomes une occasion rare d'assister à la...

item.title: Ultrahuman opens US pre-orders for Ring Pro
item.description: At the end of February, Ultrahuman announced its latest smart ring which promises up to 15 days of battery life on a single charge. Sadly, if you were based in the US, you weren’t able to pre-order the Ring Pro, as the company has been locked in a longstanding legal tussle with ring rivals Oura. Now, however, it appears the situation has been resolved, with the US Customs and Border Protection giving its blessing. Consequently, pre-orders for the Ring Pro are starting today, with the first 1,000 customers to sign up getting a hefty bonus. The smart ring market is still in its infancy, which me...

item.title: Updates From ‘The Mandalorian and Grogu’, and More
item.description: Plus, Dakota Fanning denies all those MCU rumors.

item.title: The Hisense U7SG is a great midrange TV you shouldn’t buy yet
item.description: With all of the focus on RGB LED technology, it seemed like more affordable mini-LED TVs had been shooed to the side. But with the Hisense U7SG, we're getting our first great midrange general-use TV of 2026. It gets bright, comes in a wide range of sizes, supports every HDR mode you'll ever need, has […]

item.title: Zoox is bringing its robotaxis to Austin and Miami
item.description: Zoox is stretching out its legs. The Amazon-owned robotaxi today announced that it's gearing up to expand its service in San Francisco and Las Vegas, while also eyeing two additional cities - Austin and Miami - for future service. Zoox, which is one of the few companies to use a purpose-built autonomous vehicle without traditional […]

item.title: Nuki adds Apple Home Key to its smart lock
item.description: This week, my top pick for a retrofit smart lock launched the first Aliro-compatible keypad. The Nuki Keypad 2 NFC ($179) brings tap-to-unlock via Apple's Home Key and Samsung's Digital Home Key to the Nuki smart lock, allowing you to tap your phone or smartwatch to unlock your door, just like you tap to pay. […]

item.title: TikTok ads are about to get a tad more disruptive
item.description: One new ad format displays another brand's logo alongside TikTok's on the launch page when users open the app.

item.title: Mirage raises $75M to continue building models for its AI video editing app Captions
item.description: Mirage, the maker of video editing app Captions, has raised $75 million in growth financing from General Catalyst's Customer Value Fund (CVF).

item.title: Spotify’s new SongDNA feature maps how your favorite songs are connected
item.description: The new feature lets you explore samples, covers, and more about the people behind your favorite songs, says Spotify.

item.title: Snapchat’s new ‘AI Clips’ Lens format turns photos into five-second videos
item.description: Snapchat says both experienced and new developers can use the new "AI Clips" Lens format to turn a single prompt into a published Lens in minutes without the need for external tools.

item.title: Zoox brings its robotaxis to Austin and Miami
item.description: After nearly two years of testing in the two cities, the Amazon-owned company says it's getting closer to offering rides.

item.title: Cauldron Ferm has turned microbes into nonstop assembly lines
item.description: The Australian startup says it has solved one of the biggest challenges facing synthetic biology companies, which it counts as customers.

item.title: Pinterest launches a new feature to promote a Pin
item.description: Pinterest is rolling out promoted pin feature to the users in the U.S. in coming weeks

item.title: Spotify's SongDNA can tell you all about the track you're listening to
item.description: Spotify has started rolling out a feature called SongDNA that can show you the people behind your favorite tracks and give you an insight on how they were created. You can access it by opening the Now Playing view while listening to a specific song and then scrolling down to the SongDNA box. Tracks that support the new feature will show you all the artists, writers, producers and collaborators behind them. It’s yet another way to make more music on the platform discoverable, since you’ll be able to tap on their icons to see their profiles and the other pieces they worked on. The box will also ...

item.title: Annoyed that your smart TV wants to steer you to certain services? The EU is being asked by streamers to clamp down and make TVs work more neutrally
item.description: Broadcasters and streamers say smart TVs are becoming 'gatekeepers', and want the EU to act to make sure certain services don't get preferential treatment

item.title: Beat the Amazon Spring Sale rush: 5 unmissable FlexiSpot office chair deals based on our tests, from $210
item.description: FlexiSpot's comfortable, ergonomic chairs are massively discounted ahead of Amazon's Spring Sale.

item.title: 'It's honestly my life's goal': Bridgerton season 5 will officially focus on Francesca Michaela romance — and stars are 'ready' to become LGBT icons
item.description: Bridgerton season 5 is set to focus on Francesca and Michaela's love story following John's death — meaning LGBT fans are about to lock in.

item.title: Dutton Ranch gets a surprisingly early release date — and I’m convinced Paramount+ is planning a Marshals: A Yellowstone Story crossover
item.description: Paramount has confirmed the release date for Dutton Ranch — and not only is it much earlier than expected, but it could suggest a huge Taylor Sheridan show crossover.

item.title: DLSS 5 : voici comment Nvidia veut laisser le contrôle créatif complet aux artistes
item.description: En plein damage control suite à l'annonce de son DLSS 5, Jensen Huang, président de Nvidia, s'est à nouveau exprimé sur la technologie. Dans un podcast long format, il révèle notamment comment les développeurs pourront ajuster le rendu final en jeu.

item.title: Microsoft a-t-il bloqué l’astuce pour accélérer les SSD sur Windows 11 ? Pas tout à fait…
item.description: Microsoft a désormais rendu impossible l'activation du nouveau pilote natif caché pour votre SSD. Mais il reste une manipulation possible si vous souhaitez prendre le risque.

item.title: The Morning After: WWDC 2026 is happening June 8th
item.description: It’s coming. Apple’s Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) will take place from June 8-12. Going on past timings, CEO Tim Cook will take the stage for the keynote on June 8, most likely at 1 PM ET. WWDC is a software-focused affair, so expect to see the upcoming "27" operating systems, now that the new naming convention has settled. Apple will likely cover iOS 27, iPadOS 27, macOS 27, visionOS 27, watchOS 27 and macOS 27. However, Bloomberg's Mark Gurman is suggesting that WWDC will be "a fairly muted affair," – but in all fairness, WWDC has never been that explosive. Still, there are things ...

item.title: Snapchat users sent 'nearly' 2 trillion snaps in 2025
item.description: Snapchat users are sending a staggering number of snaps to each other, according to newly released data from Snap. In 2025, Snapchat users created close to 2 trillion snaps, the company said in an update. That works out to about 5.5 billion distinct snaps per day and about 63,000 each second, according to the company. When you consider that Snapchat has about 474 million daily users, that averages to more than 11 snaps per user each day. In a blog post, the company called it "a reflection of how often people are capturing a moment in a bid to connect with one another." The numbers offer a wind...

item.title: When is Apple iOS 27 coming? Date, new features, and rumors you need to know about WWDC 2026
item.description: If you’re one of the legion of iPhone fans who can’t wait for the next major software update, there’s some good news. If you’re one of the legion of iPhone fans who can’t wait for the next major software update and all the new features it will bring, there’s some good news. Apple has revealed when you’ll be able to get a look at the iPhone’s next operating system, iOS 27—and you won’t have to wait much longer. Here’s what you need to know....

item.title: The perfect iPhone 17e deal? Visible Wireless is rebating the entire cost of the device right now
item.description: The prepaid carrier Visible Wireless is offering new customers a free iPhone 17e via rebate when you pick one up on the excellent Visible Pro Plus plan.

item.title: 'I could see where they're coming from, I don't love AI slop myself' — Nvidia CEO tries to defend DLSS 5 again, shortly after telling gamers 'they're completely wrong'
item.description: Nvidia's DLSS 5 is still suffering a major backlash from gamers, but CEO Jensen Huang has doubled down on his previous clarification.

item.title: Piratage de l’Éducation nationale : pourquoi le vol de ces données est particulièrement inquiétant
item.description: 243 000 agents de l'Éducation nationale sont touchés par un piratage massif exposant ainsi plusieurs données sensibles.

item.title: Agile Robots becomes the latest robotics company to partner with Google DeepMind
item.description: Agile Robots will incorporate Google DeepMind's robotics foundation models into its bots while collecting data for the AI research lab.

item.title: Darty retire 200 € sur ce laptop HP qui mêle écran OLED, Snapdragon X Plus et 34 heures d’autonomie
item.description: Le HP OmniBook 5 est un laptop polyvalent capable d'assurer toutes les tâches du quotidien sans aucun problème. En ce moment chez Darty, il tombe à 799,99 euros.

item.title: The Live-Action ‘Moana’ Really Thought About the Maui Wig, Despite It Looking Like That
item.description: Dwayne Johnson talks about the styling (and prosthetics!) required to bring his animated character into live action.

item.title: What is the release date for Scrubs season 10 episode 6 on Hulu and Disney+?
item.description: Scrubs season 10 episode, titled 'My V.I.P', will premiere shortly — here's when and where you can watch it.

item.title: This Premium WordPress plugin and theme have been compromised – here's how to check your website hasn't been infected
item.description: BuddyBoss had its update server compromised and used to push a poisoned update.

item.title: What OpenAI’s 4% checkout fee means for the future of commerce
item.description: Agentic commerce is already here, and OpenAI’s checkout fee is simply the first clear signal that the monetization layer has arrived with it.

item.title: Hack de l’iPhone : attention aux cyberattaques, un redoutable outil de piratage est en accès libre
item.description: Un kit de piratage taillé pour compromettre l'iPhone vient de faire une apparition remarquée sur Github. L'arme, jusqu'ici exploitée par des cybercriminels russes, est accessible à n'importe qui. Il faut s'attendre à ce que les pirates se jettent dessus…

item.title: Secretlab has discounted its World of Warcraft collab gear to celebrate the Midnight launch
item.description: Gaming furniture brand Secretlab has slashed the price of some of its World of Warcraft collab gear.

item.title: Nintendo cuts Switch 2 production amid weakening console sales
item.description: Nintendo will produce fewer Switch 2 units than it previously projected in response to weakening demand for the console in the US, Bloomberg reports. Four million units of Nintendo's flagship device are expected to be made this quarter instead of the six million it had originally planned, according to unnamed sources cited by the publication, […]

item.title: ‘AI is not here to replace expertise, it's here to elevate’: Oracle CEO says the best still to come when it comes to agentic innovation
item.description: Oracle CEO outlines his company’s ongoing plan to build “the world's largest AI cloud”.

item.title: When AI drives the M&A deal, reality arrives fast
item.description: Why AI-led acquisitions expose hidden costs, complexity, and integration risk faster than expected.

item.title: PS5 Pro architect Mark Cerny says Sony's updated PSSR tech is 'something like 100 microseconds faster than the original'
item.description: PS5 and PS5 Pro console architect Mark Cerny has revealed that Sony’s updated PSSR (PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution) AI upscaling technology is faster than the original.

item.title: Clear Drop Soft Plastic Compactor Review: Eco Experiment
item.description: Clear Drop’s Soft Plastic Compactor is a unique household recycling solution that’s fun to use, but who is it for?

item.title: LG Display porte sur PC portables l’une des plus grandes avancées énergétique de nos smartphones
item.description: LG Display annonce cette semaine être le premier fabricant de dalles LCD à produire en masse des panneaux capables de passer dynamiquement de 1 à 120 Hz sur PC portables. Une petite révolution pour nos laptops, dans le sillage de ce que l'on connaît déjà sur smartphones.
